name: meta-eval run on known-good calibration enforces the at-least-90-percent-P1-absence floor
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/meta-eval/run.sh" --target known-good --findings-stub p1_absence=0.85 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'p1_absence=0.85' err.txt && grep -q 'p1_absence_min=0.90' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
